vocab.meaning: phong cảnh hùng vĩ, cao cả (gợi sự kinh ngạc)
vocab.example: I am constantly driven to capture sublime landscapes that make me feel small in comparison to nature.

vocab.meaning: các kỹ thuật bố cục (trong nhiếp ảnh)
vocab.example: When I see a good view, I immediately start thinking about compositional techniques like the rule of thirds.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp phù du (chóng tàn, chỉ tồn tại trong khoảnh khắc)
vocab.example: Taking photos allows me to freeze the ephemeral beauty of a double rainbow or a passing storm.
For me, a photograph of a mountain range serves as a visual memento of the effort it took to get there.
There’s nothing more satisfying than snapping a shot of pristine wilderness untouched by human development.
As an amateur shutterbug, I can't resist pulling out my camera whenever I encounter a scenic lookout.
The city skyline at night provides a stunning backdrop for any urban photography enthusiast.

vocab.meaning: hậu kỳ (chỉnh sửa ảnh sau khi chụp)
vocab.example: I spend hours on post-processing to ensure the colors of the sunset look exactly as I remembered them.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát thuận lợi (thường từ trên cao)
vocab.example: I climbed to the top of the cliff to find the perfect vantage point for a wide-angle shot.

vocab.meaning: đầy cảm hứng, gợi sự ngưỡng mộ và tôn kính
vocab.example: Capturing an awe-inspiring view of the Northern Lights was a highlight of my trip to Iceland.
